fields.review_findings: Contract mismatch in HTTP workspace/list output: `cargo test --manifest-path memory-api/tools/http/ticket-http/Cargo.toml list_tickets_uses_scan_root_label_for_ticket_ref_workspace -- --nocapture` fails at memory-api/tools/http/ticket-http/src/serve/handlers/tickets/tests/listing.rs:471 because `ticket_ref.workspace` is `child--c1f343de` but the workspace-aware contract/test expects scan-root label `child`.
fields.title: [ticket-cli] Make get/search/list workspace-aware across nested roots

fields.review_findings: Pushback remediated and reverified. The HTTP workspace/list contract mismatch is fixed in memory-api/tools/http/ticket-http/src/serve/handlers/tickets/types.rs: owning_workspace_for_path now preserves the scan-root public label (best_label = root.label) instead of converting it to label--hash via canonical_workspace_name_for_index_root, and the now-unused registry imports were removed. Validation passed: rtk cargo test --manifest-path tools/http/ticket-http/Cargo.toml list_tickets_uses_scan_root_label_for_ticket_ref_workspace -- --nocapture (1 passed) and rtk cargo test --manifest-path tools/http/ticket-http/Cargo.toml listing -- --nocapture (17 passed). CLI, board, MCP, TOON, and generated guidance were previously reviewed coherent.
fields.title: [ticket-cli] Make get/search/list workspace-aware across nested roots
